name: Peach

pros.title: recognisable whole-fruit identity
pros.explanation: That simplicity is one of the category’s main advantages.

pros.title: easy to use in real life
pros.explanation: Practical, portable foods deserve some credit.

pros.title: usually comes with water and volume
pros.explanation: That helps fruit behave better than pure sugar sources.

cons.title: protein is basically absent
cons.explanation: That is normal for fruit, but still caps nutritional breadth.

cons.title: sweetness can stack up quickly
cons.explanation: Fruit still has to manage its sugar burden.

cons.title: satiety is not usually strong on its own
cons.explanation: Fruit often needs help from the rest of the meal.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
